en: Oh, cool, cryptex. Can I have it?
ko: 아, 멋지다, 크립텍스. 나 가져도 돼?

en: Hey, no. No, you can't.
ko: 안 돼. 안 돼, 안 돼.

en: Where'd you get it?
How do you know what a cryptex is?
I know what things are.
Well, Leslie hid the location of our Valentine's meeting place in here.
ko: 레슬리가 발렌타인 만남 장소를 여기 안에 숨겼어.

en: No.
I've tried every five-letter word that has anything to do with our third date.
ko: 세 번째 데이트랑 관련된 다섯 글자 단어 다 해봤어.

en: Have you tried ****?
It's a four-letter word.
Add an S?
I really don't think it's that.
I wish I could help you, bro. I don't know if I can.
You're like the second smartest guy I know.
ko: 넌 내가 아는 두 번째로 똑똑한 사람이야.

en: You should go to the first smartest guy I know.
Okay, so the clue is inside, but it takes a five-letter code to open it.
ko: 단서가 안에 있는데, 여는 데 다섯 글자 코드가 필요해.

en: Did you try ****?
Ha! Yes.
Why is that everyone's first suggestion?
Just smart people.
